shared_case_surface: witness-derived compost artifacts that keep source refs, review state, current limits, promotion boundary, and contradiction-or-demotion posture inspectable on the same provenance-preserving surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same provenance-preserving compost question, keeps the witness-facing input and downstream artifact jointly inspectable, and still covers witness-to-note distillation, note-to-principle pressure, provisional review-state visibility, contradiction-or-demotion preservation, and canon-pressure holdback without turning the bundle into canon-readiness or general artifact-polish grading.
public_safe_requirements: visible source refs remain specific enough for a bounded outside reviewer
review state and current limits stay explicit on the downstream artifact
promotion toward principle or canon remains bounded and review-gated
the resulting readout stays non-canonical and preserves contradiction or demotion posture
